name: Qwant
description: A privacy-focused search engine that displays all results on one page, including websites, social media, and images, with a dedicated version for kids.
longDescription: Qwant is a French search engine launched in 2013, designed to prioritize user privacy by avoiding tracking, cookies, and data profiling. Based in Paris, it offers a unique interface that consolidates web, news, social, and image results on a single page, alongside Qwant Junior for child-safe browsing. Qwant has gained attention as a European alternative to Google, aligning with EU privacy standards like GDPR. It collaborates with partners like Ecosia to enhance its offerings and is available across multiple platforms, emphasizing a clean, ad-light experience.
